query: A valid UTF-8 filename is rejected only when the process locale is Turkish. Explain and correct the failure.
Resume the saved invoice-timeout investigation from its checklist and preserve the two failed causes already recorded.
The queue occasionally emits the same job twice; create a deterministic test before changing the consumer.
Design a duplicate-job prevention feature; delivery guarantees and deduplication windows are not decided.
Summarize the existing error-handling architecture without making changes.
Implement the approved retry policy as new application behavior.
